entry.title: New: CR 25-75 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 147, CD1 (2025), to simplify the process for adopting real property tax rates and tiers, by: 1) deleting the requirement to reconvene the meeting in three weeks after public notice; 2) clarifying public-notice requirements; and 3) requiring the Council adopt rates and tiers by June 20, or the Mayor’s proposed rates and tiers transmitted with the annual budget will take effect.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
